profile.name: Nashwa Alya Zahra Pratiwi
profile.headline: Fullstack Developer Exploring Cloud & DevOps
about: I'm an Information Technology student at Telkom University with hands-on fullstack development experience — building backends with Express.js and Next.js frontends, working with PostgreSQL and Prisma ORM, and deploying applications on Linux servers with Docker and Nginx.

More recently, I've been expanding into cloud infrastructure and DevOps practices, exploring AWS, Azure, CI/CD pipelines, and Infrastructure as Code to build more reliable and scalable systems end-to-end.

research.narrative: I'm building end-to-end fluency across the stack — from designing backend APIs and frontend interfaces to automating how they get deployed and scaled in the cloud.

focus.name: Fullstack Development
focus.description: Building end-to-end web applications with Express.js, Next.js, and Prisma ORM.

focus.name: Backend Engineering
focus.description: Designing robust REST APIs, working with PostgreSQL databases, and managing server application logic.

focus.name: Cloud & DevOps
focus.description: Automating deployments with GitLab CI/CD, configuring Docker containers, and managing AWS/Azure VMs.

focus.name: Database Management
focus.description: Designing database schemas, managing PostgreSQL databases, and optimizing query performance using Prisma.

projects.name: BJB Perencanaan
projects.summary: Built an internal document management system — backend with Express.js and PostgreSQL/Prisma ORM, deployed on Azure VM with Nginx as reverse proxy.

footer: Building thoughtful systems and sharing what works.
